name: Mocha Ice Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Line ladyfingers around side of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Mix the softened ice creams together.
3. Add coffee granules, liqueur, and crushed toffee bars to the mixture.
4. Pour into springform pan.
5. Spread a thin layer of chocolate sauce on top.
6. Freeze until ready to serve.
7. Before serving, spread whipped cream over the cake.
8. Serve immediately after removing from the freezer.
